temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a young boy with messy, wavy blond hair. He is wearing a light-colored, possibly gray, sweatshirt. The background is dark and out of focus, suggesting an indoor setting with dim lighting. The camera remains steady, keeping the boy's emotional face as the central point of the frame. His face is filled with distress; tears are visible on his cheeks, and his expression is one of deep sadness and fear. His mouth is slightly open as if he is speaking or has just finished crying. A young boy speaks, his voice high-pitched and trembling with fear and distress. He sounds on the verge of tears as he struggles to get his words out, saying, "He's not... He's not..." His speech is broken and filled with hesitation, conveying a sense of deep anxiety and sadness. The audio is quiet, with no background music or other sounds, making the child's frightened voice the central focus. The boy continues to look around with a worried and tearful expression.
